source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 9. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 221215 (Rev.4) - PMS Update/Attachment 06. EMC Test Report/NK-20-E-0336(H&Abiz_ADD)_CE(4th).pdf

document.title: TEST REPORT IEC 60601-1-2 Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea EMC test report NK-20-E-0336 for the ADD Abyz Digital Detector under IEC 60601-1-2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence of electromagnetic emissions and immunity testing for the Abyz Digital Detector model ADD against IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015.
keyPoints: Report number NK-20-E-0336 was issued on 2020-09-21 by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
The test item is identified as Abyz Digital Detector, model/type reference ADD, manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015.
Emission and immunity test verdicts listed in the report are pass where applicable, with several items marked N/A.
Intended use is a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, excluding mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: Report NK-20-E-0336 is an IEC 60601-1-2 test report issued on 2020-09-21.
evidence.evidenceText: Report Number : NK-20-E-0336; Date of issue : 2020-09-21; TEST REPORT IEC 60601-1-2

evidence.claim: The tested product is the Abyz Digital Detector, model/type ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description : Abyz Digital Detector; Model/Type reference : ADD

evidence.claim: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. prepared the report and performed testing at its Yongin-si, Republic of Korea location.
evidence.evidenceText: Name of Testing Laboratory preparing the Report : Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Testing location: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155, 153 and 159, Osan-ro, Mohyeon-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do 16885, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant’s name : H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer : H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The report applies IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and states fulfillment of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard : IEC 60601-1-2:2014; The product fulfils the requirements of - IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015

evidence.claim: The device ratings include input 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A and output d.c. 16 V, 3 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Ratings : Input : 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A Output : d.c. 16 V, 3 A Detector : d.c. 16 V, 3 A Rechargeable Li-ion Battery : d.c. 11.1 V

evidence.claim: The test item is classified for installation and use as a stationary X-ray system with AC public network supply connection.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of installation and use : Stationary X-ray System; Supply Connection : AC Public Network

evidence.claim: Testing was performed from 2020-04-20 to 2020-07-10 after receipt of the test item on 2020-04-20.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of receipt of test item : 2020-04-20; Date(s) of performance of tests : 2020-04-20 to 2020-07-10

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, replacing film based radiographic diagnostic systems.
evidence.evidenceText: Abyz Digital Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children. It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems

evidence.claim: The device is not intended for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Intended ENVIRONMENT Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: Conducted emissions, radiated emissions, harmonic current emissions, voltage fluctuation/flicker, and listed immunity tests passed where applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: Test standards and results ... CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS; Radiated Emission PASS; IEC 61000-3-2 ... PASS; IEC 61000-3-3 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-2 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-3 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-4 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-5 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-6 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-8 ... PASS; IEC 61000-4-11 ... PASS

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 terminal disturbance voltages and radiation disturbance verdicts were pass.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 ... Terminal disturbance voltages ... P; Radiation disturbance ... P

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 AC mains harmonics and IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuations and flicker verdicts were pass.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 ... AC-Mains Harmonics ... P; IEC 61000-3-3 ... AC-Mains Voltage fluctuations and flicker ... P

evidence.claim: IEC 60601-1-2 immunity tests for electrostatic discharge, radiated RF EM fields, fast transients, surges, conducted RF disturbances, magnetic fields, voltage dips, voltage interruptions, and RF wireless proximity fields were pass.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2 ... ELECTROSTATIC DISCHARGE ... P; Radiated RF EM fields ... P; Electrical fast transients / bursts ... P; Surges ... P; Conducted disturbances induced by RF fields ... P; RATED power frequency magnetic fields ... P; Voltage dips ... P; Voltage interruptions ... P; IMMUNITY to proximity fields from RF wireless communications equipment ... P

evidence.claim: Electrical transient conduction along supply lines is not applicable because the device is not intended for vehicles or ambulances with 12 V or 24 V electrical systems.
evidence.evidenceText: Not Applicable, device is not intended to be installed in passenger cars and light commercial vehicles including ambulances fitted with 12 V electrical systems or commercial vehicles including ambulances fitted with 24 V electrical systems
evidence.pageTarget: Electrical Transient Conduction Along Supply Lines

evidence.claim: The test report states that test results relate only to the object tested.
evidence.evidenceText: The test results presented in this report relate only to the object tested.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision/version is not stated in the source text; sourcePath mentions Rev.4, but extraction did not use it as document revision because it is not present in SOURCE_TEXT.
Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the source is a laboratory EMC test report and references Nemko, IECEE, and CB/NCB concepts, but no regulatory authority approval or jurisdiction is stated.
ProductSignal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 is not present in SOURCE_TEXT; model extracted only as ADD.
Possible conflicting class wording: main report and applicable standards indicate Group 1, Class A, while Attachment 7 states 'Class 1 / Group 1'.
OCR/text quality has minor artifacts such as split words and misspellings, but core metadata and results are readable.
